chunks.title: Judgment on Israel's Idolatry
chunks.reason: A unified oracle warning Israel against rejoicing due to their spiritual harlotry and predicting exile.

chunks.title: The Days of Punishment
chunks.reason: An argumentative section describing the corruption of prophets and the loss of fertility as divine judgment.

chunks.title: Final Woe to Ephraim
chunks.reason: A concluding speech detailing the destruction of Ephraim's lineage and their rejection by God.
